body.title: Repo auditor: Nanny Ogg cron + web UI flag panel
body.result: nanny cron entry + _run_repo_audit() + GET/POST /api/device/hubert/audit_flags + review_flag() + 3 new tests; all pass
body.intention: I intend that the structural auditor runs nightly via Nanny Ogg and surfaces its flags in the Hubert web fascia with dismiss/approve actions, making the output actionable rather than a report no one reads.
body.description:
Wire the structural auditor into operations:

1. **Nanny Ogg cron**: add `nightly_repo_audit` to the Nanny default schedule — runs `run_structural_audit('.')` at 03:00 daily, writes to `hubert.audit_flags`
2. **Web fascia panel**: add a 'Commit Audit' section to the Hubert fascia at `/api/device/hubert/audit_flags` — lists unreviewed flags sorted by severity; each flag has Dismiss / Confirm buttons that write `reviewed_at` + `verdict` back to the DB

**Affected files:** devices/nanny_ogg/ (cron registration), devices/hubert/device.py, web_server/static/ (fascia JS), web_server/app.py (API endpoint)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; channel post on new HIGH-severity flags
**Scope boundary:** IN — cron registration, REST endpoint, fascia panel with dismiss/confirm. OUT — email/alert on flags (use channel post only).
**Completion criteria:** `GET /api/device/hubert/audit_flags` returns JSON list of unreviewed flags; cron entry appears in `/cron list`; dismissing a flag from the web UI sets `reviewed_at` and `verdict`; a HIGH severity flag triggers a channel post.
